understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to guide the character to the goal gem tile ('+') in each level by moving horizontally and using clicks to remove breakable blocks, while avoiding spike tiles ('u'/'v') that instantly end the run. Each level must be completed within the turn limit and attempt budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) trigger automatic gravity-driven falling until the character lands on a safe tile, hits a spike, or reaches the goal. CLICK removes a breakable block at a specified coordinate, opening new fall paths. UNDO reverts the last action. The corridor scan and landing previews show exactly where the character will land after each move, including passages to new vertical sections. Rising platforms create a turn-based deadline that forces upward progress. Gravity is consistent per level (down or up), and the goal is always located in the gravity direction.
